mapper.insert: /* GuestToken.insertGuestToken */ INSERT INTO TB_GUEST_TOKEN ( GUEST_ID, PARTNER_ID, SUB_DOMAIN, GUEST_TOKEN, CLIENT_IP, USER_AGENT, DEVICE_TYPE, OS, BROWSER, REFERER_URL, CURRENT_URL, UTM_SOURCE, UTM_MEDIUM, UTM_CAMPAIGN, UTM_CONTENT, FBCLID, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID, EXPIRE_DATE, CONTACT_DATE, CRE_TM ) VALUES ( #{guestId}, #{partnerId}, #{subDomain}, #{guestToken}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, #{deviceType}, #{os}, #{browser}, #{refererUrl}, #{currentUrl}, #{utmSource}, #{utmMedium}, #{utmCampaign}, #{utmContent}, #{fbclid}, #{socialAccountId}, #{expireDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: /* GuestToken.selectGuestTokenByGuestId */ SELECT ID, GUEST_ID, PARTNER_ID, GUEST_TOKEN, CLIENT_IP, USER_AGENT, DEVICE_TYPE, OS, BROWSER, REFERER_URL, UTM_SOURCE, UTM_MEDIUM, UTM_CAMPAIGN, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID, EXPIRE_DATE, CRE_TM FROM TB_GUEST_TOKEN WHERE GUEST_ID = #{guestId}
mapper.delete: /* GuestToken.deleteExpiredGuestToken */ DELETE FROM TB_GUEST_TOKEN WHERE EXPIRE_DATE < NOW() AND SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID IS NULL -- ← 회원 연결 안 된 것만 삭제
